summary: 2026-07-04 23:02:54 PDT. Reviewed `git diff 39129f8...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 39129f8..HEAD`, and `reviews/meeting-summary-history.md`. The approved fix is present: summaries now get `id: String(endedAt)` in `buildMeetingSummary`, `addMeetingSummary` no longer assigns `newId('m')`, and the changed call path preserves distinct IDs across reloads so the server dedup merge will not overwrite prior `m100` rows. I found no regressions in the scoped diff. `git diff --check` passed; the targeted Vitest run was blocked by the read-only sandbox’s Vite temp-file `EPERM`, not by a test failure.
